query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: An illuminated pedestrian walk signal displaying a white walking figure composed of small bright dots, positioned against a dark background with deep blue tones visible along the edges of the signal housing.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A severely underexposed photograph of a pedestrian walk signal, where extreme shadow crushing blacks out nearly all environmental detail, leaving only the white illuminated walking figure and subtle deep-blue edge tones visible in a stark, graphic composition created by deliberate exposure extremes.
